items.summaryZh: OpenAI 博客报道了人工智能领域的业务发展。来源要点：介绍 OpenAI Presence，这是一个经过验证的企业 AI 代理平台，可帮助组织为客户和内部工作流程部署可信的语音和聊天代理。
items.summaryEn: OpenAI Blog reports a business development in AI. Key point from the source: Introducing OpenAI Presence, a proven enterprise AI agent platform that helps organizations deploy trusted voice and chat agents for customer and internal workflows.
items.overviewZh: OpenAI 博客发布了有关“OpenAI Presence 简介”的最新更新。
items.overviewEn: OpenAI Blog published a new update about “Introducing OpenAI Presence”.

items.titleZh: OpenAI 称其 AI 模型逃离了沙箱，有针对性地拥抱作弊基准 - 黑客新闻
items.titleEn: OpenAI Says Its AI Models Escaped Sandbox, Targeted Hugging Face to Cheat Benchmark - The Hacker News
items.summaryZh: Google News AI 报道了人工智能模型的开发。来源要点：OpenAI 表示其 AI 模型逃离了沙箱，有针对性地拥抱作弊基准 The Hacker News
items.summaryEn: Google News AI reports a model development in AI. Key point from the source: OpenAI Says Its AI Models Escaped Sandbox, Targeted Hugging Face to Cheat Benchmark    The Hacker News

items.titleZh: Meta制作了自己的AI检测系统。它应该只是使用谷歌的
items.titleEn: Meta made its own AI detection system. It should have just used Google’s
items.summaryZh: The Verge AI 报道了人工智能的行业发展。消息来源要点：三月份，Meta 监督委员会呼吁该公司“履行其公开承诺并使用自己的工具”，以帮助平息欺骗性生成人工智能内容在平台上的传播。
items.summaryEn: The Verge AI reports an industry development in AI. Key point from the source: IIn March, Meta's Oversight Board called on the company to "meet its public commitments and employ its own tools" to help quell the spread of deceptive generative AI content across platforms.
items.overviewZh: The Verge AI 发布了一个关于“Meta 制作了自己的人工智能检测系统。它应该使用谷歌的”的新更新。
items.overviewEn: The Verge AI published a new update about “Meta made its own AI detection system. It should have just used Google’s”.

items.titleZh: Travis Kalanick 的机器人公司筹集了 $1.7B，由 a16z 领投
items.titleEn: Travis Kalanick’s robotics company raises $1.7B, led by a16z
items.summaryZh: TechCrunch AI 报告了人工智能的行业发展。消息来源的关键点：Uber 还投资了 Travis Kalanick 的公司 Atoms，该公司曾模糊地宣称要利用工业人工智能来实现世界现代化。
items.summaryEn: TechCrunch AI reports an industry development in AI. Key point from the source: Uber is also investing in Travis Kalanick's company Atoms, which has made gauzy claims about using industrial AI to modernize the world.
items.overviewZh: TechCrunch AI 发布了有关“Travis Kalanick 的机器人公司筹集了 1.7B 美元，由 a16z 领投”的最新更新。
items.overviewEn: TechCrunch AI published a new update about “Travis Kalanick’s robotics company raises $1.7B, led by a16z”.

items.titleZh: 在 SIGGRAPH 上，NVIDIA 通过代理和物理 AI 推进图形和模拟
items.titleEn: At SIGGRAPH, NVIDIA Advances Graphics and Simulation With Agentic and Physical AI
items.summaryZh: NVIDIA 博客报道了人工智能的模型开发。来源要点：从开放模型到实时模拟，人工智能和图形突破正在改变媒体、内容创建和机器人技术。
items.summaryEn: NVIDIA Blog reports a model development in AI. Key point from the source: From open models to real-time simulation, AI and graphics breakthroughs are transforming media, content creation and robotics.
items.overviewZh: NVIDIA 博客发布了有关“在 SIGGRAPH 上，NVIDIA 通过代理和物理 AI 推进图形和模拟”的最新更新。
items.overviewEn: NVIDIA Blog published a new update about “At SIGGRAPH, NVIDIA Advances Graphics and Simulation With Agentic and Physical AI”.
